note: verify-2 of iter-1..5 remainder: 7 GO, 5 REFINE, 0 hard-refute. Banked set has settled.

claim: GO: answer-as-next-query graph retrieval with convergence stop; no internal equivalent (memory_context single-pass). iter-8 CG-context-extension-convergence is its concrete impl.
GO: multi-pass entity/relation extraction (broad->refine) vs internal single-pass extraction. Additive.
GO (expired_at half only): event-invalidity timestamp is the genuinely-absent half vs internal valid_at/invalid_at; created_at/updated_at already exist. Narrow additive edge-schema add.
GO: linked_memory_ids emitted at extraction-time builds the relationship graph at write vs post-hoc causal-link calls. EXTENDS memclaw; additive.
GO: query-length-bucketed BM25 sigmoid midpoints. EXTENDS aionforge; small additive BM25-channel calibration.
GO: quadratic high-degree dampening 1/(1+0.001*(n-1)^2) maps to degree/co-activation channel; small additive.
GO: Letta recursive-summarize->truncate fallback ladder when summarization fails. NET-NEW vs internal compaction; additive safety net.

MOST-LIKELY-WRONG: merge already in insertEdge (SELECT-then-UPDATE, idempotent — same as iter-6 CG-composite-edge-dedup refutation). Only salvage = batch-preload perf (preload existing edges once per save vs per-edge SELECT). Re-scope to perf, not correctness.
REFINE: entity-name canonicalization already exists (normalizeEntityName). Net-new sliver = snapping relation/entity CLASSES to a controlled vocabulary, not name normalization.
REFINE: neighborhood expansion already informs ranking; net-new part is a feedback_weight + an explicit post-retrieval rescore loop.
evidence: vs internal neighborhood expansion in ranking

claim: REFINE (high-effort): internal has NO episode model — episode-scoped provenance is a schema-level build, not an additive tweak. Park behind a do-we-introduce-episodes decision.
evidence: no episode table in mcp_server schema

claim: REFINE (gated): window-of-N-episodes context assembly is meaningless without the episode model (GR-episode-provenance). Gated.

Re-confirms iter-6: causal graph is memory-ID->memory-ID and there is NO episode model. These two facts gate the entity-cluster (iter-8 Graphiti community) and episode (GR-episode-*) candidates — not refuted, but carrying a structural prerequisite the cheap candidates do not.
